# Version 3.116.1
> **Android NDK r27c and 16 KB page alignment** · Released December 5, 2024 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.116.1) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.116.1)
> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.116.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.116.1 is a servicing release that updates the Android NDK to r27c and enables 16 KB page alignment.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## Platform

- **Android NDK bumped to r27c with 16 KB page alignment** — Rebuilds the Android natives on NDK r27c and aligns them to 16 KB pages so SkiaSharp keeps loading on Android 15+ devices that use larger memory pages. ([#3098](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3098))
